name: Megabuilding 8 Expanded ( with Apartments )
description: The Megabuilding 8 YOU DESERVE ! Basically 2 mods IN ONE! Now the Top Floor Penthouse is FULLY DECORATED and ready for you to move in to ! AMM also unlocks a New Elevator floor, taking you to the NEW Floating Glass House with great views of NC as well ! AMM IS NEEDED TO RESTORE DOORS AND THE ELEVATOR. RESTORING THE ELEVATOR UNLOCKS A SECRET FLOOR !
